reason: Check that the implementation did not move RVV-specific route facts into generic core routing.
Check target artifact registry behavior, duplicate/missing route diagnostics, and front-door route coherence.
Check generated RVV direct source/header/object behavior and route identity preservation.
Check that validation stays focused and uses lit/FileCheck/C++ tests.
Verified manifest shape, explicit RVV contribution, missing-route behavior, and duplicate rejection.
Verified existing i32 vsub direct route behavior and stale-route failure after manifest migration.
Verified i64 direct source/header route behavior and helper registration visibility.
Verified i64 direct object route emits a non-empty RISC-V relocatable object when local RVV object clang support is available.
Verified existing e2e helper route compatibility, including legacy generic RVV direct aliases.
Verified bundle route compatibility after direct route manifest migration.
